name: core
description: Default Soma setup — breath cycle, heat tracking, learning protocols, and clean memory structure. What every agent starts with.
author: meetsoma
notes: 13 bundled protocols ship with meetsoma — no install needed. Includes: breath-cycle, heat-tracking, session-checkpoints, pattern-evolution, working-style, quality-standards, tool-discipline, correction-capture, detection-triggers, pre-flight, frontmatter-standard, git-identity, task-tracking. Hub protocols (e.g. workflow, community-safe) can be added via `soma install protocol <name>`.
